ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category (e.g., Men, Women, Children) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region (e.g., US, UK, EU) */,
  "fabric_type" TEXT /* Type of fabric */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the apparel style */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the size chart was created */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the size chart was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the chart is currently active */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the chart */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES apparel_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., Men, Women, Children) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, UK, EU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region's sizing standards */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the region is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart it belongs to */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "fabric_type" TEXT /* Type of fabric */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, merchandiser, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart related to the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User comments regarding fit and sizing */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., scale of 1 to 5) */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "fabric_type" TEXT /* Type of fabric */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the apparel style */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the issue has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES apparel_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart that has been updated */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the size chart */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made */,
  "date_changed" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apparel_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apparel style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style (e.g., Casual, Formal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the style is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "style_sizing" (
  "style_sizing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style sizing entry */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the apparel style */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated size chart */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the style-sizing link is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_sizing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_sizing_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_sizing_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES apparel_styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity available in stock */,
  "fabric_type" TEXT /* Type of fabric */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the apparel style */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the inventory record is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES apparel_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)
